reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 1249.5 (Targeting VAH). 2. SL Dist: 750.5 (Below 15m local support). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.66. 4. Floor Check: Price (71150.5) is above POC (70070.88), which mandates a non-bearish stance. 5. Logic: While the 15m chart shows a low-volume grind, the 1h chart confirms price is holding above the high-volume node (POC). As long as the POC holds as support, the path of least resistance is toward the Value Area High (VAH) at 72400. The stop loss is placed below the recent 15m consolidation to protect against a mean-reversion to the POC.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离: 1249.5 (目标 VAH)。2. 止损距离: 750.5 (位于 15m 局部支撑下方)。3. 盈亏比: 1.66。4. 支撑检查: 价格 (71150.5) 高于 POC (70070.88)，根据指令不进行做空。5. 逻辑: 尽管 15 分钟图显示成交量萎缩，但 1 小时图确认价格维持在控制点 (POC) 之上。只要 POC 作为支撑位不破，阻力最小的方向是向价值区高点 (VAH) 72400 移动。止损设在近期 15 分钟盘整区间下方，以防价格回测 POC。
